chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 113 of 2026 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.723/2026 (U/A) 2. For orders on MA No.724/2026 (Ex./A) 3. For hearing of bail application 04.02.2026 Mr. Aftab Hussain Shar, Advocate along with applicants / accused..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is allowed. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 3. Applicants / accused Umed Ali alias Mewo S/o Wali Dino and Muharram Ali S/o Ali Dinro, both by caste Aradin, seek protective bail in Crime No.14 of 2024, registered at Police Station Khenwari, District Khairpur, under Sections 462-C, 384, 506/2, 148, 149, PPC. It is, inter alia, contended that the applicants / accused are prepared to surrender before the trial Court, but apprehend their arrest at the hands of police. Without touching merits of the case, protective bail is granted to the applicants / accused for a period of five working days, subject to their furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.10,000/- (Rupees ten thousand) each and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Additional Registrar of this Court. Operation of the NBWs, if any, shall stand suspended for the aforesaid period. Applicants / accused shall surrender before the trial Court within the same period. This order shall cease to have any effect after expiry of five working days or when the applicants surrender before the trial court, whichever occurs earlier. The bail application stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
